title: [kimi-review] 96a2a2a: [SEVERITY: medium] The stated rationale ("strict `>` to allo
description:
Commit: 96a2a2a1c
Message: fix(coap): correct base64_encode buffer check off-by-one Uses strict > to allow exact fits. Closes project-LICHEN-ja8d

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] The stated rationale ("strict `>` to allow exact fits") cannot be validated without code, and is only correct if `base64_encode` does **not** write a null terminator. If the function appends `'\0'` after the encoded output, then allowing `output_len == buf_size` produces a one-byte buffer overflow — i.e., this "fix" would convert an off
